name: forge
description: Meta-plugin that creates production-grade Claude Code plugins through a 4-phase pipeline: internet research, clarifying questions, architecture blueprint, and full code generation. Learns from every build to improve future plugin quality.

research_depth.description: How many search queries to run during research phase (3=quick, 7=thorough, 12=exhaustive)

auto_validate.description: Automatically validate plugin structure after generation (true/false)

default_complexity.description: Default plugin complexity: minimal, standard, or full-featured

github_token.description: GitHub personal access token for scanning repos and existing plugins (optional)
